gap_items.reason: Current router classifies query type but does not rewrite ambiguous or underspecified user queries.

gap_items.recommended_fix: Add rewrite contract, deterministic trace, refusal boundary, and fixture-based tests.
gap_items.deterministic_local_implementation_path: Deterministic query parsing, routing, rewrite constraints, and retrieval-plan schemas.

gap_items.llm_dependency_policy: LLM is optional assistive layer only for Query Rewrite; Core v3.7 path must remain usable without configured providers.

gap_items.reason: Core parses PDF text locally and accepts Markdown, but does not emit a LiteDoc-like PDF-to-Markdown preprocessing artifact before KB ingestion.

gap_items.recommended_fix: Add local PDF-to-Markdown preprocessing report and artifact in the parser hardening track without integrating LiteDoc directly.
